description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure with highly distorted and elongated limbs and torso, as if stretched unnaturally in multiple directions. The head and upper torso are somewhat recognizable, with the face partially visible and arms extended forward, but the rest of the body appears warped and twisted, merging into long, ribbon-like extensions. The legs are similarly elongated and bent at odd angles, giving the figure a surreal, almost liquid appearance. The clothing appears to be a single-piece outfit, possibly resembling a suit or uniform, but the extreme distortion makes it difficult to discern specific garment details. The overall form is dynamic and abstract, suggesting motion or transformation, but lacks realistic anatomical proportions.
description: A highly distorted adult human figure with elongated limbs and torso, appearing stretched and twisted in a surreal manner. The face and upper body are partially recognizable, but the rest of the form is abstract and ribbon-like.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face and upper torso most clearly, with the arms and legs stretched and twisted downward.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the extreme elongation of the torso and arms, with the head jutting forward and the legs bent backward.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the ribbon-like extensions of the limbs and the merging of the torso into elongated forms.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the head and arms extended forward, with the legs and lower body twisted and trailing behind.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with long-sleeve jacket and trousers
attribute_posture: arms extended forward, body and limbs extremely stretched and twisted
